name: GHS_UCDB
description: <span style="font-family: &quot;Avenir Next W01&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next W00&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next&quot;, Avenir, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, sans-serif; font-size: 16px;">The Global Human Settlement Layer Urban Centres Database (GHS-UCDB) is the most complete database on cities to date, publicly released as an open and free dataset - GHS STAT UCDB2015MT GLOBE R2019A V1.0. The database represents the global status on Urban Centres in 2015 by offering cities location, their extent (surface, shape), and describing each city with a set of geographical, socio-economic and environmental attributes, many of them going back 25 or even 40 years in time. Urban Centres are defined in a consistent way across geographical locations and over time, applying the “Global Definition of Cities and Settlements” developed by the European Union to the Global Human Settlement Layer Built-up (GHS-BUILT) areas and Population (GHS-POP) grids. This report contains the description of the dimensions and the derived attributes that characterise the Urban Centres in the database. The document includes notes about methodology and sources. The GHS-UCDB contains information for more than 10,000 Urban Centres and it is the baseline data of the analytical results presented in the Atlas of the Human Planet 2018.</span>

fields.name: OBJECTID
fields.description: {"value":"","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: ID_HDC_G0
fields.description: {"value":"Unique ID of the Urban Centre","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: QA2_1V
fields.description: {"value":"Quality Code (0 – false positive, 1 – true positive,  greater than 1 uncertain).","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: AREA
fields.description: {"value":"","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: BBX_LATMN
fields.description: {"value":"latitude of the low left corner of the bounding box","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: BBX_LONMN
fields.description: {"value":"longitude of the low left corner of the bounding box","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: BBX_LATMX
fields.description: {"value":"latitude of the top right corner of the bounding box","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: BBX_LONMX
fields.description: {"value":"longitude of the top right corner of the bounding box","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: GCPNT_LAT
fields.description: {"value":"Latitude of the geometric centroid","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: GCPNT_LON
fields.description: {"value":"Longitude of the geometric centroid","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: CTR_MN_NM
fields.description: {"value":"the name of the main country, i.e., the country within which borders the majority of the area of the Urban Centre is located","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: CTR_MN_ISO
fields.description: {"value":"the ISO 3 code of the main country, i.e., the country within which borders the majority of the area of the Urban Centre is located","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: XBRDR
fields.description: {"value":"cross border (the value 1 indicates if it is a cross border Urban Centre, while value 0 is assigned to Urban Centres which whole polygon lays within borders of only one country)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: XCTR_NBR
fields.description: {"value":"number of the countries with which the Urban Centre polygon crosses","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: XC_NM_LST
fields.description: {"value":"","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: XC_ISO_LST
fields.description: {"value":"list of ISO-3 codes of the countries with which the Urban Centre polygon crosses (separation char: ‘;’)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: GRGN_L1
fields.description: {"value":"Major Geographical Region (UNDESA, 2018b), according to the classification of the main country","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: GRGN_L2
fields.description: {"value":"Geographical Region (UNDESA, 2018b), according to the classification of the main country","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: UC_NM_MN
fields.description: {"value":"the main name of the Urban Centre (the country ISO 3 is declared within ‘[]’, to support the cross border entities)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: UC_NM_LST
fields.description: {"value":"full list of assigned names of the Urban Centre (the country ISO 3 is declared within ‘[]’, to support the cross border entities)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: UC_NM_SRC
fields.description: {"value":"source of the list of names per each country (WUP, GRUMP, NE, GN, WM – online mapping services, OTHER – web user feedback and other manual revisions)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H75_NBR
fields.description: {"value":"number of separate Urban Centres delineated in the 1975 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H90_NBR
fields.description: {"value":"number of separate Urban Centres delineated in the 1990 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H00_NBR
fields.description: {"value":"number of separate Urban Centres delineated in the 2000 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H75_AREA
fields.description: {"value":"overall area of Urban Centres delineated in the 1975 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H90_AREA
fields.description: {"value":"overall area of Urban Centres delineated in the 1990 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: H00_AREA
fields.description: {"value":"overall area of Urban Centres delineated in the 2000 falling within the polygon of the Urban Centre 2015","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_BM_NM_LST
fields.description: {"value":"semi-colon separated list of names of biome classes, intersecting with the spatial domain of the Urban Centre","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_SL_LST
fields.description: {"value":"semi-colon separated list of names of soil groups, intersecting with the spatial domain of the Urban Centre","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: EL_AV_ALS
fields.description: {"value":"the average elevation estimated within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre, and expressed in metres above sea level (MASL)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_KG_NM_LST
fields.description: {"value":"semi-colon separated list of names of Köppen-Geiger climate classes, intersecting with the spatial domain of the Urban Centre","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_RB_NM_LST
fields.description: {"value":"semi-colon separated list of major river basins names, intersecting with the spatial domain of the Urban Centre","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_P_90
fields.description: {"value":"average precipitations calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 1990 (the interval spans from 1988 to 1991) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre; and expressed in millimetres (mm), the amount of rain per square meter in one hour)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_P_00
fields.description: {"value":"average precipitations calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 2000 (the interval spans from 1999 to 2002) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre; and expressed in millimetres (mm), the amount of rain per square meter in one hour)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_P_14
fields.description: {"value":"average precipitations calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 2015 (the interval spans from 2012 to 2015) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre; and expressed in millimetres (mm), the amount of rain per square meter in one hour)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_T_90
fields.description: {"value":"average temperature calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 1990 (the interval spans from 1988 to 1991) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre, and expressed in Celsius degrees (°C)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_T_00
fields.description: {"value":"average temperature calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 2000, (the interval spans from 1999 to 2002) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre, and expressed in Celsius degrees (°C)","fieldValueType":""}

fields.name: E_WR_T_14
fields.description: {"value":"average temperature calculated from annual average estimates for time interval centred on the year 2015 (the interval spans from 2012 to 2015) within the spatial domain of the Urban Centre, and expressed in Celsius degrees (°C)","fieldValueType":""}
